channel.title: Ref on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Ref on Classroom

item.title: DigitalOcean Account Setup
item.description: Deploy faster & scale easier with an application server that saves your team time & money

item.title: Keep Learning
item.description: Pentester learning roadmap — OS fundamentals, networking, Active Directory, web apps, recommended labs, and certifications like OSCP.

item.title: Free Certifications
item.description: Curated list of free cybersecurity and IT certifications — Google Cloud, Azure, CompTIA, Kubernetes, and more with direct links.
